name: Avila's El Ranchito
deal:

name: BLK Earth Spirits
deal: Free Kids Breakfast on Saturdays and Sundays from 10am-1pm with the purchase of a qualifying adult entree.

name: Blind Coyote Cantina
deal: Kids Eat Free Sundays! Every Sunday from 4-8pm, kids 12 & under eat FREE with the purchase of an adult entree.

name: Burger Lounge
deal: Kids eat free every Tuesday and Sunday at Burger Lounge! Just purchase an entree and receive a complimentary Kid's Lounge Meal when you mention this offer or use code: KIDS

deal: Kids get a full-size Plain Udon or California Roll for free with the purchase of an adult entree on Tuesdays and Thursdays.

deal: All day Sundays at Cha Cha's in Irvine, enjoy a FREE kids' meal with any entree purchase.

name: Chick-Fil-A Laguna Niguel
deal: Kids Eat Free on Saturdays from 12pm-8pm. Order through the Chick-fil-A app to redeem.

deal: Kids get free smoothies Mondays with purchase of $7.25 smoothie.

deal: Kids 11 and under get a free meal with the purchase of a $15 entree! One kids meal per adult meal.
